summary: Emotionally resonant performance with strong set flow; recording quality appears adequate though unspecified
review: The reviewer is moved by the first‑set sequence Wave to the Wind → Drumz → Days → Throwing Stones → Not Fade Away, especially the lyrical poignancy of “Days Between.” No technical flaws are noted, suggesting a listenable source, while the musical delivery earns a solid four‑star rating.

ai_rating.rationale: Single positive review highlights strong show moments and gives no recording complaints; limited data leads to low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on sound clarity, mix or source; absence of criticism implies acceptable quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer notes a compelling progression from Wave to the Wind through Drumz and Days into Throwing Stones, ending with Not Fade Away, emphasizing emotional continuity.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Reviewer highlights Jerry’s vocal lines (“when all we ever wanted…”) as emotionally powerful.
